creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
marcus      2006-11-25 20:02:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/portlint       Makefile 
    devel/portlint/src   portlint.pl 
  Log:
  Update to 2.9.2.
  
  * Replace a dead autotools link with a FreeBSD-based link instead [1]
  * Replace USE_*_VER with USE_AUTOTOOLS instead [2]
  * Check for a valid EXPIRATION_DATE [3]
  
  PR:             104042 [3]
  Requested by:   piotr.smyrak@heron.pl [1]
  Reported by:    ahze [2]
  Submitted by:   vd [3]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.113     +1 -2      ports/devel/portlint/Makefile
  1.92      +22 -4     ports/devel/portlint/src/portlint.pl
